vacation_simulator_0.0.3.description:
This is a rewrite of the Vacation Simulator APWorld released by chandler.
Current changes from that APWorld include:
- Rewriting all of the logic using RuleBuilder, which should speed the world up slightly and add some extras for players
- Reduced Fill Errors by making all non logically required Memories into standard items instead of progression.
- Has an `archipelago.json` file, so the world will work in future versions of AP

The world still uses the same slot data formatting and yaml settings as the original, so it should be a drop in replacement in it's current state. This may change in later updates.
vacation_simulator_0.0.3.title: Vacation Simulator 0.0.3

vacation_simulator_0.0.4.description:
New:
- `Early Big Item` Option.
   - This option forces an addition `Gate Unlock` or `Camera` early. This should reduce early locking in multiworlds, and slightly lower `Fill Error` generation failures when generating solo.

Changes:
- Removed location data from slot data
- Removed the `helpers.py` file
   - After further research, it seems like the mod was not actually reading the location data out of slot data. And since the only thing in helpers.py` was something to help with filling the location data, both have been removed. This should lower slot data size significantly, and slightly speed up gen output.

This update does not require a mod update.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/energymaster22/Archipelago/compare/vacation_simulator_0.0.3...vacation_simulator_0.0.4
vacation_simulator_0.0.4.title: Vacation Simulator 0.0.4
